tests.name: v3_valid_real_world_eval_dots
tests.description: Real-world eval with dotted field refs, concat, and dotted string literals

tests.name: v3_where_requires_full_consumption
tests.description: where must consume the full eval expression (no trailing tokens)

tests.name: v3_eval_requires_commas_between_assignments
tests.description: eval assignment lists require commas between assignments

tests.name: v3_where_unclosed_parenthesis
tests.description: where expression with unclosed parentheses should error

tests.name: v3_where_supports_eqeq_and_like
tests.description: where supports == and LIKE operators
tests.spl: | makeresults | eval status=200, user="admin" | where status == 200 AND user LIKE "adm%"

tests.name: v3_subsearch_parsed_and_validated
tests.description: Bracketed subsearch must start with a generating command
tests.spl: | makeresults | join type=inner host [ stats count ]

tests.name: v3_prefix_not_with_subsearch_is_parsed
tests.description: Prefix NOT before a bracketed subsearch should still parse and validate the subsearch

tests.name: v3_required_args_sort
tests.description: sort requires at least one field argument

tests.name: v3_head_count_suppresses_default_limit_warning
tests.description: head N should not warn about default 10

tests.name: v3_fields_command_narrows_available_fields
tests.description: fields <list> should narrow the available field set for later warnings
tests.spl: | makeresults | eval dns.sld="x", a=2 | fields a | table nothing

tests.name: v3_eval_dotted_keyword_segment
tests.description: Dotted field segments may be keyword tokens (foo.by)

tests.name: v3_sort_rejects_comma_only_arg
tests.description: sort requires a field; punctuation must not satisfy required args

tests.name: v3_fields_allows_commas_as_separators
tests.description: fields a, b should not treat ',' as a field
tests.spl: | makeresults | eval a=1, b=2 | fields a, b | table nothing

tests.name: v3_empty_subsearch_has_distinct_error_code
tests.description: Empty subsearch should use SPL022 (distinct from function arity SPL020)

tests.name: v3_search_in_operator_valid
tests.description: search supports <field> IN (<value-list>)

tests.name: v3_search_in_whitespace_separated_values_warns
tests.description: IN value list tolerates whitespace-separated quoted strings (warns for style)

tests.name: v3_search_in_empty_items_warns
tests.description: IN value list tolerates empty items like leading/trailing commas (warns for style)

tests.name: v3_search_prefix_not_in_valid
tests.description: search uses prefix NOT: NOT <field> IN (...)

tests.name: v3_search_not_in_wrong_order_invalid
tests.description: search does not use SQL-style <field> NOT IN (...)

tests.name: v3_search_lowercase_in_warns
tests.description: search IN keyword casing is a best-practice warning

tests.name: v3_where_in_operator_is_invalid
tests.description: where supports IN (...) operator

tests.name: v3_time_modifiers_allow_at_snap
tests.description: earliest/latest relative time modifiers may include @ snap syntax

tests.name: v3_time_modifiers_allow_minus_unit
tests.description: earliest supports -h style relative time modifiers

tests.name: v3_time_modifiers_allow_at_prefix
tests.description: earliest supports @w0 style snap-to time modifiers

tests.name: v3_search_in_value_allows_wildcards_and_dots
tests.description: IN value list accepts wildcard and dotted bare values

tests.name: v3_search_in_value_allows_ipv4_cidr
tests.description: IN value list accepts IPv4 CIDR values like 172.16.0.0/12

tests.name: v3_search_in_trailing_comma_warns
tests.description: IN value list with a trailing comma is tolerated but warned

tests.name: v3_markdown_fence_is_ignored_with_warning
tests.description: Markdown ```...``` is not SPL and is ignored for validation

tests.name: v3_eval_macro_skips_validation_with_warning
tests.description: Macros inside eval are not expanded; validator warns and skips further eval validation
tests.spl: | makeresults | eval a=1, b=2 `my_macro()` | table a
